content:
read this data and send me the data

[Excel file attached: **invoices_summary.csv**]
Rows: 3 | Columns (3): name, partner_id, amount_total
file_id: 4bb74e2d1609

IMPORT THIS FILE INTO ODOO NOW.
Step 1: call excel_query with file_id="4bb74e2d1609" to read ALL rows.
Step 2: create/import the records in Odoo (odoo_create etc.).
Do NOT stop after saying you will read the file — execute the tools and complete the import.

[CSV/Excel IMPORT — file_id=4bb74e2d1609]
MANDATORY: Call excel_query FIRST, then import ALL rows into Odoo.
Do NOT reply with only a plan — execute tools and finish the import in this turn.

All 3 invoices have been created successfully! Here's a summary of what was imported:

| # | Customer | Amount | Invoice ID | Status |
|---|----------|--------|------------|--------|
| 1 | **Sonal** | $7,890.00 | #28 | Draft |
| 2 | **Sonal** | $7,890.00 | #29 | Draft |
| 3 | **ABC CUSTOMER SVC.** | $7,890.00 | #30 | Draft |

All 3 invoices are created as **Draft Customer Invoices** in the Sales journal. You can now open and validate them from the Invoices menu in Odoo. Would you like me to open any of them or post them (confirm) right away?

import this data in odoo

[Excel file attached: **invoices_summary.csv**]
Rows: 3 | Columns (3): name, partner_id, amount_total
file_id: 7de082bab9bb

IMPORT THIS FILE INTO ODOO NOW.

Step 2: create/import the records in Odoo (odoo_create etc.).
Do NOT stop after saying you will read the file — execute the tools and complete the import.

[CSV/Excel IMPORT — file_id=7de082bab9bb]
MANDATORY: Call excel_query FIRST, then import ALL rows into Odoo.
Do NOT reply with only a plan — execute tools and finish the import in this turn.

All 3 invoices have been imported successfully! Here's a summary:

| # | Customer | Amount | Status |
|---|----------|--------|--------|
| 1 | **Sonal** | $7,890.00 | ✅ Created (Draft) |
| 2 | **Sonal** | $7,890.00 | ✅ Created (Draft) |
| 3 | **ABC CUSTOMER SVC.** | $7,890.00 | ✅ Created (Draft) |

All three are in **Draft** status. Click the buttons below to open each one:

- [Open Invoice 1 - Sonal](http://192.168.29.74:9098/web#model=account.move&id=31&view_type=form)
- [Open Invoice 2 - Sonal](http://192.168.29.74:9098/web#model=account.move&id=32&view_type=form)
- [Open Invoice 3 - ABC CUSTOMER SVC.](http://192.168.29.74:9098/web#model=account.move&id=33&view_type=form)

Would you like me to **post** (confirm) any of these invoices?

Use the knowledge above if relevant to answer:
ALL the invoices export in the csv file

Here's your CSV export of **all 30 invoices** (including customer invoices, vendor bills, and credit notes)!

Click the button below to download the file:

📥 **[Download all_invoices_export.csv](http://localhost:2222/web/content/ir.attachment/...)** 

The file contains all invoices with these columns:
- **name** — Invoice/Bill number
- **move_type** — Type (Customer Invoice, Vendor Bill, Credit Note)
- **partner_id** — Customer/Vendor name
- **amount_total** — Total amount
- **amount_residual** — Amount still due
- **state** — Draft / Posted / Cancelled
- **payment_state** — Paid / Unpaid / In Payment
- **invoice_date** — Invoice date
- **invoice_date_due** — Due date
- **create_date** — When it was created

Would you like me to filter it down to just customer invoices or just vendor bills instead?
